Creed III (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $156,248,615Details
International Box Office $119,900,000
Worldwide Box Office $276,148,615
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,085,152
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,683,669
Total $2,768,821
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After dominating the boxing world, Adonis Creed has been thriving in both his career and family life. When a childhood friend and former boxing prodigy, Damian, resurfaces after serving a long sentence in prison, he is eager to prove that he deserves his shot in the ring. The face-off between former friends is more than just a fight. To settle the score, Adonis must put his future on the line to battle Damian—a fighter who has nothing to lose.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$58,370,007 (37.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.68 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:56.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$75,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,007 opening theaters/4,007 max. theaters, 5.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $170,816,583

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 3rd, 2023 (Wide) by MGM
March 3rd, 2023 (IMAX) by MGM
International Releases: March 1st, 2023 (Wide) (South Korea)

March 2nd, 2023 (Wide), released as Creed III (Крид III) (Russia (CIS))
March 2nd, 2023 (Wide) (Slovakia)

Synopsis

After dominating the boxing world, Adonis Creed has been thriving in both his career and family life. When a childhood friend and former boxing prodigy, Damian, resurfaces after serving a long sentence in prison, he is eager to prove that he deserves his shot in the ring. The face-off between former friends is more than just a fight. To settle the score, Adonis must put his future on the line to battle Damian—a fighter who has nothing to lose.
